review_text: Great taste and fast shipping! The packaging was solid.
Service was slow and the staff forgot our drinks.
Package arrived late and the box was damaged.
Loved the ambiance and the desserts were delicious.
Customer support resolved my issue quickly.
Portions are small for the price. Food was okay.
The product stopped working after a week. Bad quality.
Fantastic brunch menu with fresh ingredients.
Instructions were unclear and setup was frustrating.
Waited 45 minutes for a table. Not worth it.
